title: Gal Pals Brighton Fringe
description: Gal Pals is coming to Brighton Spiegeltent! Gal Pals returns to Brighton for Brighton Fringe for our yearly day party - this time at the iconic Spiegeltent! Gal Pals is a queer pop party for lesbians, dykes, queer and bi women, transmasc, transfemme and non-binary people - playing the best in female-fronted pop, hip-hop, r&b and queer bangers! Expect to hear: Ariana Grande, Ashnikko, Beyonce, Bree Runway, Britney, COBRAH, Cardi B, Carly Rae Jepson, Charli XCX, Chappell Roan, Destiny’s Child, Doechii, Doja Cat, Dua Lipa, Janelle Monae, Jennifer Lopez, Kim Petras, Kylie, Lady Gaga, Madonna, Megan Thee Stallion, Rihanna, Robyn, SOPHIE, Shygirl, Sugababes and many more! Who Can Come to Gal Pals? Gal Pals is an intentional space prioritising queer women, trans and/or non-binary people and those of marginalised gender expressions. We ask allies to only attend with friends who are from those communities and to consider the space they take up as the venue has limited capacity.
content_warnings: This show may include strobe lighting, smoke, haze and some strong language in the lyrics of the music played
